ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Promoters of Ajanta Pharma Limited, Aayush Agrawal Trust and Mr. Aayush Agrawal, have pledged an aggregate of 1,006,726 equity shares to secure a new loan, as disclosed under SEBI regulations. This action materially impacts the company by exposing a significant portion of promoter holdings to potential invocation, risking dilution of control and stock price volatility if the loan defaults. While share pledges are common for financing, the unspecified purpose of this "new loan" could be viewed as a minor red flag regarding the promoters' underlying financial needs.
